parameters.name: usespoutactivesender
parameters.label: Use Spout Active Sender
parameters.description: Spout has a external utility that allows selecting from the list of senders running, and flagging one as the global 'Active' sender. Enabling this parameter will make the node use that sender instead

parameters.name: sendername
parameters.label: Sender Name
parameters.description: The name of the Syphon/Spout sender you wish to receive.
